description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe featuring a predominantly white mesh and synthetic upper with striking red accents around the toe, heel, and collar. The shoe has a black Nike Swoosh logo on the side and the word 'AIR MAX' visible on the heel, indicating it is part of the Nike Air Max line. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with white laces, and the interior lining is a vibrant red. The midsole is white with sculpted contours, and the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber, though the tread pattern is not visible. The shoe shows some signs of wear, particularly around the toe and heel areas, with minor discoloration and creasing. Overall, it is a lightweight, flexible shoe designed for comfort and performance in urban environments.
description: A white and red Nike Air Max running shoe with a black Swoosh, standard laces, and visible signs of light wear.
description_view_0: Front and top view showing the white mesh upper, red toe accent, and standard criss-cross lacing.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting the red heel collar, sculpted midsole, and partial black heel accent.
description_view_2: Back and lateral side view displaying the black Nike Swoosh, 'AIR MAX' text, and red heel details.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view emphasizing the black Swoosh, red interior lining, and white laces.
attribute_logo: Black Nike Swoosh on the side; 'AIR MAX' text on the heel in white.
